message:
fix(tools): harden auto-registration to prevent identity spoofing

When auto-registering unknown agents during contact handshake or message
resolution, the code now passes "unknown" literals for program and model
fields and None for task_description/attachments_policy, instead of
forwarding the caller's own identity metadata.

This prevents an identity spoofing vector where agent A could register
agent B with A's own program/model/task metadata, making B appear to be
running A's software in the agent registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -334,10 +334,10 @@ async fn resolve_or_register_agent(
                 pool,
                 project_id,
                 agent_name,
-                &sender.program,
-                &sender.model,
-                Some(sender.task_description.as_str()),
-                Some(sender.attachments_policy.as_str()),
+                "unknown",
+                "unknown",
+                None,
+                None,
             )
             .await
             {
